nodes.name: docker-compose.yml
nodes.summary: Docker Compose file orchestrating the feature-store integration test environment, including the feature-store server, a RisingWave instance, and supporting volumes.

nodes.name: Dockerfile
nodes.summary: Builds the feature-store server image on Ubuntu 20.04, installing Python ML dependencies, Rust toolchain, .NET SDK, and compiling both the server and simulator binaries for the feature-store integration test scenario.
nodes.languageNotes: Unusual polyglot image: installs Python (pip), Rust (cargo), and .NET SDK 6.0 in a single Ubuntu image to support the diverse feature-store service stack.
